deviations.what: Breadth-probe (cross-library test). Ten sap.tnt InfoLabels across color schemes / render modes / icon / displayOnly, in FlexBox rows.

sap.tnt.InfoLabel.icon (@since 1.74) is used 1:1 (one InfoLabel carries icon='sap-icon://home-share'). Newer than UI5 1.71; declared per the property-171 policy. Previously undeclared because the property gate is blind to sap.tnt; found by the non-sap.m @since audit 2026-07-24.

structural_diff.reason: breadth/capability probe — renders the control but is not a faithful 1:1 rebuild of the full sample
